title: Playtime counter
description: Now you can see how long u have played!
body:
**Playtime Tracker** This utility is a lightweight, lag-free solution for monitoring player activity. It converts raw game ticks into a readable format without requiring a permanent, clunky scoreboard on the side of your screen.

Players can use these /trigger commands without needing operator (OP) permissions:

**/trigger pt_show:** This displays the player's Total World Playtime (Hours, Minutes, and Seconds) directly in the chat. It pulls data from the engine-level statistics, so it includes time spent before the datapack was installed.  

**/trigger pt_on:** This enables a persistent Hotbar Display. The playtime will appear and update in real-time right above the player's item bar. 

**/trigger pt_off:** This disables the hotbar display and clears the text from the screen if a player prefers a clean UI.  

**How to Install/Download the File**: Ensure you have the Playtime_Datapack_Fixed_V2.zip ready.Navigate to **Save Folder**: Open your Minecraft directory, go to saves, and select your specific world folder.

**Drop in Datapacks:** Open the datapacks folder and move the ZIP file inside.Reload the  

**How to UseThe Command:** To see your current time, simply type: /trigger pt_show.  The Display: You will see a private chat message formatted as: Your total playtime: 1h 12m 30s.  


**Caution: This datapack will only show the playtime from the amount of time you have installed this datapack**
